summoners.name: Flash
summoners.description: Teleports you a short distance toward your cursor.

summoners.name: Teleport
summoners.description: After a brief channel, become untargetable and travel to an allied unit. Upgrades into Unleashed Teleport, which significantly increases travel speed.

runes.name: Health
runes.description: Grants flat bonus health.

runes.name: Adaptive Force
runes.description: Grants bonus adaptive force.

runes.name: Attack Speed
runes.description: Grants bonus attack speed.

runes.name: Summon Aery
runes.description: Your attacks and abilities send Aery to a target, damaging enemies or shielding allies.

runes.name: Manaflow Band
runes.description:
Hitting an enemy champion with an ability permanently increases your maximum mana by 25, up to 250 mana.

After reaching 250 bonus mana, restore 1% of your missing mana every 5 seconds.

runes.name: Transcendence
runes.description:
Gain bonuses upon reaching the following levels:
Level 5: +5 Ability Haste
Level 8: +5 Ability Haste
Level 11: On Champion takedown, reduce the remaining cooldown of basic abilities by 20%.

runes.name: Scorch
runes.description: Your first damaging ability hit every 10s burns champions.

runes.name: Bone Plating
runes.description:
After taking damage from an enemy champion, the next 3 spells or attacks you receive from them deal 30-60 (based on level) less damage.

Duration: 1.5s
Cooldown: 55s

runes.name: Overgrowth
runes.description: Gain permanent max health when minions or monsters die near you.
